response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development and a strong background in C and C++ from his time at National Instruments, but his primary expertise lies in modern web technologies (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React) and languages like Dlang rather than C++ for industrial automation. His lack of recent or dedicated experience in C++ for large-scale, high-performance systems, secure development lifecycle (SDL), or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) raises concerns. However, his problem-solving skills, architectural contributions, and openness to learning could make him a potential fit with additional training.
strengths: Strong foundational knowledge in C/C++ from National Instruments experience
Proven ability to architect and deliver scalable, event-driven systems (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, refactoring practices)
concerns: Limited recent or specialized experience in C++ for industrial automation or high-performance systems
No documented exposure to IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle practices per industrial standards
Most recent C++ work is outdated (2015) and not aligned with the role's technical stack priorities
